block_00: Take a look at the top news of the week
block_03: Coinbase stock continued lower after announcing a federal investigation regarding the possible sale of unregistered securities. The cryptocurrency exchange reported a fresh probe along with its second-quarter results on 9 August. Its stock has reversed lower this week, including a 5.5% drop Wednesday.
block_07: The company has found early success with its paid subscription service Snapchat+, which has reached 1 million subscribers since its launch. The share price has risen by 12% this week
block_10: Shares of consumer-oriented meme stocks plunged by 9.6% on Wednesday, as for AMC, the share price has fallen by 18% this week. However, the company’s shares are volatile, both on the way up and the way down.
